goog.module ID: Blockly.bumpObjects\n\nimport {RenderedWorkspaceComment} from './comments/rendered_workspace_comment.js';\nimport type {Abstract} from './events/events_abstract.js';\nimport type {BlockCreate} from './events/events_block_create.js';\nimport type {BlockMove} from './events/events_block_move.js';\nimport type {CommentCreate} from './events/events_comment_create.js';\nimport type {CommentMove} from './events/events_comment_move.js';\nimport type {CommentResize} from './events/events_comment_resize.js';\nimport {isViewportChange} from './events/predicates.js';\nimport {BUMP_EVENTS, EventType} from './events/type.js';\nimport * as eventUtils from './events/utils.js';\nimport type {IBoundedElement} from './interfaces/i_bounded_element.js';\nimport type {ContainerRegion} from './metrics_manager.js';\nimport * as mathUtils from './utils/math.js';\nimport type {WorkspaceSvg} from './workspace_svg.js';\n\n/**\n * Bumps the given object that has passed out of bounds.\n *\n * @param workspace The workspace containing the object.\n * @param bounds The region to bump an object into. For example, pass\n *     ScrollMetrics to bump a block into the scrollable region of the\n *     workspace, or pass ViewMetrics to bump a block into the visible region of\n *     the workspace. This should be specified in workspace coordinates.\n * @param object The object to bump.\n * @returns True if object was bumped.\n */\nfunction bumpObjectIntoBounds(\n  workspace: WorkspaceSvg,\n  bounds: ContainerRegion,\n  object: IBoundedElement,\n): boolean {\n  // Compute new top/left position for object.\n  const objectMetrics = object.getBoundingRectangle();\n  const height = objectMetrics.bottom - objectMetrics.top;\n  const width = objectMetrics.right - objectMetrics.left;\n\n  const topClamp = bounds.top;\n  const boundsBottom = bounds.top + bounds.height;\n  const bottomClamp = boundsBottom - height;\n  // If the object is taller than the workspace we want to\n  // top-align the block\n  const newYPosition = mathUtils.clamp(\n    topClamp,\n    objectMetrics.top,\n    bottomClamp,\n  );\n  const deltaY = newYPosition - objectMetrics.top;\n\n  // Note: Even in RTL mode the \"anchor\" of the object is the\n  // top-left corner of the object.\n  let leftClamp = bounds.left;\n  const boundsRight = bounds.left + bounds.width;\n  let rightClamp = boundsRight - width;\n  if (workspace.RTL) {\n    // If the object is wider than the workspace and we're in RTL\n    // mode we want to right-align the block, which means setting\n    // the left clamp to match.\n    leftClamp = Math.min(rightClamp, leftClamp);\n  } else {\n    // If the object is wider than the workspace and we're in LTR\n    // mode we want to left-align the block, which means setting\n    // the right clamp to match.\n    rightClamp = Math.max(leftClamp, rightClamp);\n  }\n  const newXPosition = mathUtils.clamp(\n    leftClamp,\n    objectMetrics.left,\n    rightClamp,\n  );\n  const deltaX = newXPosition - objectMetrics.left;\n\n  if (deltaX || deltaY) {\n    object.moveBy(deltaX, deltaY, ['inbounds']);\n    return true;\n  }\n  return false;\n}\nexport const bumpIntoBounds = bumpObjectIntoBounds;\n\n/**\n * Creates a handler for bumping objects when they cross fixed bounds.\n *\n * @param workspace The workspace to handle.\n * @returns The event handler.\n */\nexport function bumpIntoBoundsHandler(\n  workspace: WorkspaceSvg,\n): (p1: Abstract) => void {\n  return (e) => {\n    const metricsManager = workspace.getMetricsManager();\n    if (!metricsManager.hasFixedEdges() || workspace.isDragging()) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (BUMP_EVENTS.includes(e.type ?? '')) {\n      const scrollMetricsInWsCoords = metricsManager.getScrollMetrics(true);\n\n      // Triggered by move/create event\n      const object = extractObjectFromEvent(\n        workspace,\n        e as eventUtils.BumpEvent,\n      );\n      if (!object) {\n        return;\n      }\n      // Handle undo.\n      const existingGroup = eventUtils.getGroup() || false;\n      eventUtils.setGroup(e.group);\n\n      const wasBumped = bumpObjectIntoBounds(\n        workspace,\n        scrollMetricsInWsCoords,\n        object as IBoundedElement,\n      );\n\n      if (wasBumped && !e.group) {\n        console.warn(\n          'Moved object in bounds but there was no' +\n            ' event group. This may break undo.',\n        );\n      }\n      eventUtils.setGroup(existingGroup);\n    } else if (isViewportChange(e)) {\n      if (e.scale && e.oldScale && e.scale > e.oldScale) {\n        bumpTopObjectsIntoBounds(workspace);\n      }\n    }\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Extracts the object from the given event.\n *\n * @param workspace The workspace the event originated\n *    from.\n * @param e An event containing an object.\n * @returns The extracted\n *    object.\n */\nfunction extractObjectFromEvent(\n  workspace: WorkspaceSvg,\n  e: eventUtils.BumpEvent,\n): IBoundedElement | null {\n  let object = null;\n  switch (e.type) {\n    case EventType.BLOCK_CREATE:\n    case EventType.BLOCK_MOVE:\n      object = workspace.getBlockById((e as BlockCreate | BlockMove).blockId!);\n      if (object) {\n        object = object.getRootBlock();\n      }\n      break;\n    case EventType.COMMENT_CREATE:\n    case EventType.COMMENT_MOVE:\n    case EventType.COMMENT_RESIZE:\n      object = workspace.getCommentById(\n        (e as CommentCreate | CommentMove | CommentResize).commentId!,\n      ) as RenderedWorkspaceComment;\n      break;\n  }\n  return object;\n}\n\n/**\n * Bumps the top objects in the given workspace into bounds.\n *\n * @param workspace The workspace.\n */\nexport function bumpTopObjectsIntoBounds(workspace: WorkspaceSvg) {\n  const metricsManager = workspace.getMetricsManager();\n  if (!metricsManager.hasFixedEdges() || workspace.isDragging()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const scrollMetricsInWsCoords = metricsManager.getScrollMetrics(true);\n  const topBlocks = workspace.getTopBoundedElements();\n  for (let i = 0, block; (block = topBlocks[i]); i++) {\n    bumpObjectIntoBounds(workspace, scrollMetricsInWsCoords, block);\n  }\n}\n","/**\n * @license\n * Copyright 2021 Google LLC\n * SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n// Former goog.module ID: Blockly.clipboard\n\nimport {BlockCopyData, BlockPaster} from './clipboard/block_paster.js';\nimport * as registry from './clipboard/registry.js';\nimport type {ICopyData, ICopyable} from './interfaces/i_copyable.js';\nimport {isSelectable} from './interfaces/i_selectable.js';\nimport * as globalRegistry from './registry.js';\nimport {Coordinate} from './utils/coordinate.js';\nimport {WorkspaceSvg} from './workspace_svg.js';\n\n/** Metadata about the object that is currently on the clipboard. */\nlet stashedCopyData: ICopyData | null = null;\n\nlet stashedWorkspace: WorkspaceSvg | null = null;\n\nlet stashedCoordinates: Coordinate | undefined = undefined;\n\n/**\n * Copy a copyable item, and record its data and the workspace it was\n * copied from.\n *\n * This function does not perform any checks to ensure the copy\n * should be allowed, e.g. to ensure the block is deletable. Such\n * checks should be done before calling this function.\n *\n * Note that if the copyable item is not an `ISelectable` or its\n * `workspace` property is not a `WorkspaceSvg`, the copy will be\n * successful, but there will be no saved workspace data. This will\n * impact the ability to paste the data unless you explictily pass\n * a workspace into the paste method.\n *\n * @param toCopy item to copy.\n * @param location location to save as a potential paste location.\n * @returns the copied data if copy was successful, otherwise null.\n */\nexport function copy<T extends ICopyData>(\n  toCopy: ICopyable<T>,\n  location?: Coordinate,\n): T | null {\n  const data = toCopy.toCopyData();\n  stashedCopyData = data;\n  if (isSelectable(toCopy) && toCopy.workspace instanceof WorkspaceSvg) {\n    stashedWorkspace = toCopy.workspace;\n  } else {\n    stashedWorkspace = null;\n  }\n\n  stashedCoordinates = location;\n  return data;\n}\n\n/**\n * Gets the copy data for the last item copied. This is useful if you\n * are implementing custom copy/paste behavior.   !workspace.isReadOnly() &&\n        focused != null &&\n        isIDeletable(focused) &&\n        focused.isDeletable() &&\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        // Don't delete the block if a ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.V, [\n    KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n  ]);\n\n  const pasteShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.PASTE,\n    preconditionFn() {\n      // Regardless of the currently focused workspace, we will only\n      // paste into the last-copied-from workspace.\n      const workspace = clipboard.getLastCopiedWorkspace();\n      // If we don't know Event) {\n      const copyData = clipboard.getLastCopiedData();\n      if (!copyData) return false;\n\n      const copyWorkspace = clipboard.getLastCopiedWorkspace();\n      if (!copyWorkspace) return false;\n\n      clearPasteHints(workspace);\n\n      const targetWorkspace = copyWorkspace.isFlyout\n        ? copyWorkspace.targetWorkspace\n        : copyWorkspace;\n      if (!targetWorkspace || targetWorkspace.isReadOnly()) return false;\n\n      if (e instanceof PointerEvent) {\n        // The event that triggers a shortcut would conventionally be a KeyboardEvent.\n        // However, it may be a PointerEvent if a context menu item was used as a\n        // wrapper for this callback, in which case the new block(s) should be pasted\n        // at the mouse coordinates where the menu was opened, and this PointerEvent\n        // is where the menu was opened.\n        const mouseCoords = svgMath.screenToWsCoordinates(\n          targetWorkspace,\n          new Coordinate(e.clientX, e.clientY),\n        );\n        return !!clipboard.paste(copyData, targetWorkspace, mouseCoords);\n      }\n\n      const copyCoords = clipboard.getLastCopiedLocation();\n      if (!copyCoords) {\n        // If we don't have location data about the original copyable, let the\n        // paster determine position.\n        return !!clipboard.paste(copyData, targetWorkspace);\n      }\n\n      const {left, top, width, height} = targetWorkspace\n        .getMetricsManager()\n        .getViewMetrics(true);\n      const viewportRect = new Rect(top, top + height, left, left + width);\n\n      if (viewportRect.contains(copyCoords.x, copyCoords.y)) {\n        // If the original copyable is inside the viewport, let the paster\n        // determine position.\n        return !!clipboard.paste(copyData, targetWorkspace);\n      }\n\n      // Otherwise, paste in the middle of the viewport.\n      const centerCoords = new Coordinate(left + width / 2, top + height / 2);\n      return !!clipboard.paste(copyData, targetWorkspace, centerCoords);\n    },\n    keyCodes: [ctrlV],\n    displayText: () => Msg['PASTE_SHORTCUT'],\n  };\n\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(pasteShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Keyboard shortcut to undo the previous action on ctrl+z, cmd+z, or alt+z.\n */\nexport function registerUndo() {\n  const ctrlZ = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.Z, [\n    KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n  ]);\n\n  const undoShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.UNDO,\n    preconditionFn(workspace) {\n      return (\n        !workspace.isReadOnly() &&\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !getFocusManager().ephemeralFocusTaken()\n      );\n    },\n    callback(workspace, e) {\n      // 'z' for undo 'Z' is for redo.\n      (workspace as WorkspaceSvg).hideChaff();\n      workspace.undo();\n      e.preventDefault();\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [ctrlZ],\n    displayText: () => Msg['UNDO'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(undoShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Keyboard shortcut to redo the previous action on ctrl+shift+z, cmd+shift+z,\n * or alt+shift+z.\n */\nexport function registerRedo() {\n  const ctrlShiftZ = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.Z, [\n    KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n    KeyCodes.SHIFT,\n  ]);\n\n  // Ctrl-y is redo in Windows.  Command-y is never valid on Macs.\n  const ctrlY = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.Y, [\n    KeyCodes.CTRL,\n  ]);\n\n  const redoShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.REDO,\n    preconditionFn(workspace) {\n      return (\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !workspace.isReadOnly() &&\n        !getFocusManager().ephemeralFocusTaken()\n      );\n    },\n    callback(workspace, e) {\n      // 'z' for undo 'Z' is for redo.\n      (workspace as WorkspaceSvg).hideChaff();\n      workspace.redo();\n      e.preventDefault();\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [ctrlShiftZ, ctrlY],\n    displayText: () => Msg['REDO'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(redoShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcuts for keyboard-driven movement of workspace\n * elements.\n */\nexport function registerMovementShortcuts() {\n  const getCurrentDraggable = (\n    workspace: WorkspaceSvg,\n  ): IDraggable | undefined => {\n    const node = getFocusManager().getFocusedNode();\n    if (isDraggable(node)) return node;\n    return (\n      workspace\n        .getNavigator()\n        .getSourceBlockFromNode(getFocusManager().getFocusedNode()) ?? undefined\n    );\n  };\n\n  const shiftM = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.M, [\n    KeyCodes.SHIFT,\n  ]);\n\n  const startMoveShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.START_MOVE,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) => {\n      const startDraggable = getCurrentDraggable(workspace);\n      return !!startDraggable && KeyboardMover.mover.canMove(startDraggable);\n    },\n    callback: (workspace, e) => {\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      const startDraggable = getCurrentDraggable(workspace);\n      // Focus the root draggable in case one of its children\n      // was focused when the move was triggered.\n      if (startDraggable) {\n        getFocusManager().focusNode(startDraggable);\n      }\n      return (\n        !!startDraggable &&\n        KeyboardMover.mover.startMove(startDraggable, e as KeyboardEvent)\n      );\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.M],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_START_MOVE'],\n  };\n  const shortcuts: ShortcutRegistry.KeyboardShortcut[] = [\n    startMoveShortcut,\n    {\n      ...startMoveShortcut,\n      name: names.START_MOVE_STACK,\n      keyCodes: [shiftM],\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_START_MOVE_STACK'],\n    },\n    {\n      name: names.FINISH_MOVE,\n      preconditionFn: () => KeyboardMover.mover.isMoving(),\n      callback: (_workspace, e) =>\n        KeyboardMover.mover.finishMove(e as KeyboardEvent),\n      keyCodes: [KeyCodes.ENTER, KeyCodes.SPACE],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_FINISH_MOVE'],\n    },\n    {\n      name: names.ABORT_MOVE,\n      preconditionFn: () => KeyboardMover.mover.isMoving(),\n      callback: (_workspace, e) =>\n        KeyboardMover.mover.abortMove(e as KeyboardEvent),\n      keyCodes: [KeyCodes.ESC],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_ABORT_MOVE'],\n    },\n    {\n      name: names.MOVE_LEFT,\n      preconditionFn: () => KeyboardMover.mover.isMoving(),\n      callback: (_workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        return KeyboardMover.mover.move(Direction.LEFT, e as KeyboardEvent);\n      },\n      keyCodes: [\n        KeyCodes.LEFT,\n        ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.LEFT, [\n          KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n        ]),\n      ],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_MOVE_LEFT'],\n    },\n    {\n      name: names.MOVE_RIGHT,\n      preconditionFn: () => KeyboardMover.mover.isMoving(),\n      callback: (_workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        return KeyboardMover.mover.move(Direction.RIGHT, e as KeyboardEvent);\n      },\n      keyCodes: [\n        KeyCodes.RIGHT,\n        ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.RIGHT, [\n          KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n        ]),\n      ],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_MOVE_RIGHT'],\n    },\n    {\n      name: names.MOVE_UP,\n      preconditionFn: () => KeyboardMover.mover.isMoving(),\n      callback: (_workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        return KeyboardMover.mover.move(Direction.UP, e as KeyboardEvent);\n      },\n      keyCodes: [\n        KeyCodes.UP,\n        ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.UP, [\n          KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n        ]),\n      ],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_MOVE_UP'],\n    },\n    {\n      name: names.MOVE_DOWN,\n      preconditionFn: () => KeyboardMover.mover.isMoving(),\n      callback: (_workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        return KeyboardMover.mover.move(Direction.DOWN, e as KeyboardEvent);\n      },\n      keyCodes: [\n        KeyCodes.DOWN,\n        ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.DOWN, [\n          KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD,\n        ]),\n      ],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_MOVE_DOWN'],\n    },\n  ];\n\n  for (const shortcut of shortcuts) {\n    ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(shortcut);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Keyboard shortcut to show the context menu on ctrl/cmd+Enter, shift+F10, and\n * the menu key.\n */\nexport function registerShowContextMenu() {\n  const ctrlEnter = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(\n    KeyCodes.ENTER,\n    [KeyCodes.CTRL_CMD],\n  );\n\n  const shiftF10 = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.F10, [\n    KeyCodes.SHIFT,\n  ]);\n\n  const contextMenuShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.MENU,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) => {\n      return !workspace.isDragging();\n    },\n    callback: (workspace, e) => {\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      const target = getFocusManager().getFocusedNode();\n      if (hasContextMenu(target)) {\n        target.showContextMenu(e);\n        contextmenu.getMenu()?.highlightNext();\n\n        return true;\n      }\n      return false;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [ctrlEnter, shiftF10, KeyCodes.CONTEXT_MENU],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_SHOW_CONTEXT_MENU'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(contextMenuShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcuts to navigate around the Blockly interface.\n */\nexport function registerArrowNavigation() {\n  const shortcuts: {\n    [name: string]: ShortcutRegistry.KeyboardShortcut;\n  } = {\n    /** Go to the next location to the right. */\n    right: {\n      name: names.NAVIGATE_RIGHT,\n      preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n        !widgetDiv.isVisible(),\n      callback: (workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n        const node = workspace.RTL\n          ? getFocusManager().getFocusedTree()?.getNavigator().getOutNode()\n          : getFocusManager().getFocusedTree()?.getNavigator().getInNode();\n        if (!node) {\n          workspace.getAudioManager().playErrorBeep();\n          return false;\n        }\n        getFocusManager().focusNode(node);\n        return true;\n      },\n      keyCodes: [KeyCodes.RIGHT],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_NAVIGATE_RIGHT'],\n    },\n\n    /** Go to the next location to the left. */\n    left: {\n      name: names.NAVIGATE_LEFT,\n      preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n        !widgetDiv.isVisible(),\n      callback: (workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n        const node = workspace.RTL\n          ? getFocusManager().getFocusedTree()?.getNavigator().getInNode()\n          : getFocusManager().getFocusedTree()?.getNavigator().getOutNode();\n        if (!node) {\n          workspace.getAudioManager().playErrorBeep();\n          return false;\n        }\n        getFocusManager().focusNode(node);\n        return true;\n      },\n      keyCodes: [KeyCodes.LEFT],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_NAVIGATE_LEFT'],\n    },\n\n    /** Go down to the next location. */\n    down: {\n      name: names.NAVIGATE_DOWN,\n      preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n        !widgetDiv.isVisible(),\n      callback: (workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n        const node = getFocusManager()\n          .getFocusedTree()\n          ?.getNavigator()\n          .getNextNode();\n        if (!node) {\n          workspace.getAudioManager().playErrorBeep();\n          return false;\n        }\n        workspace.getAudioManager().maybePlayScopeChangeAudioCue(node);\n        getFocusManager().focusNode(node);\n        return true;\n      },\n      keyCodes: [KeyCodes.DOWN],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_NAVIGATE_DOWN'],\n    },\n    /** Go up to the previous location. */\n    up: {\n      name: names.NAVIGATE_UP,\n      preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n        !widgetDiv.isVisible(),\n      callback: (workspace, e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n        const node = getFocusManager()\n          .getFocusedTree()\n          ?.getNavigator()\n          .getPreviousNode();\n        if (!node) {\n          workspace.getAudioManager().playErrorBeep();\n          return false;\n        }\n        workspace.getAudioManager().maybePlayScopeChangeAudioCue(node);\n        getFocusManager().focusNode(node);\n        return true;\n      },\n      keyCodes: [KeyCodes.UP],\n      allowCollision: true,\n      displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_NAVIGATE_UP'],\n    },\n  };\n\n  for (const shortcut of Object.values(shortcuts)) {\n    ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(shortcut);\n  }\n}\n\nconst resolveWorkspace = (workspace: WorkspaceSvg) => {\n  if (workspace.isFlyout) {\n    const target = workspace.targetWorkspace;\n    if (target) {\n      return resolveWorkspace(target);\n    }\n  }\n  return workspace.getRootWorkspace() ?? workspace;\n};\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcut to focus the workspace.\n */\nexport function registerFocusWorkspace() {\n  const focusWorkspaceShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.FOCUS_WORKSPACE,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) => !workspace.isDragging(),\n    callback: (workspace) => {\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      getFocusManager().focusNode(resolveWorkspace(workspace));\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.W],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_FOCUS_WORKSPACE'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(focusWorkspaceShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcut to focus the toolbox.\n */\nexport function registerFocusToolbox() {\n  const focusToolboxShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.FOCUS_TOOLBOX,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) => !workspace.isDragging(),\n    callback: (workspace, event) => {\n      const toolbox = workspace.getToolbox();\n      if (toolbox) {\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n        getFocusManager().focusTree(toolbox);\n        event.preventDefault();\n        return true;\n      } else {\n        const flyout = workspace.getFlyout();\n        if (!flyout) return false;\n\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n        getFocusManager().focusTree(flyout.getWorkspace());\n        event.preventDefault();\n        return true;\n      }\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.T],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_FOCUS_TOOLBOX'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(focusToolboxShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcut to announce information about the focused\n * element.\n */\nexport function registerReadInformation() {\n  const announceBlockInformation = (block: BlockSvg) => {\n    const description = computeAriaLabel(block, aria.Verbosity.LOQUACIOUS);\n    aria.announceDynamicAriaState(description);\n  };\n\n  const announceWorkspaceInformation = (workspace: WorkspaceSvg) => {\n    const rootWorkspace = resolveWorkspace(workspace);\n    const stackCount = rootWorkspace.getTopBlocks().length;\n    const commentCount = rootWorkspace.getTopComments().length;\n\n    // Build base string with block stack count.\n    let baseMsgKey;\n    if (stackCount === 0) {\n      baseMsgKey = 'WORKSPACE_CONTENTS_BLOCKS_ZERO';\n    } else if (stackCount === 1) {\n      baseMsgKey = 'WORKSPACE_CONTENTS_BLOCKS_ONE';\n    } else {\n      baseMsgKey = 'WORKSPACE_CONTENTS_BLOCKS_MANY';\n    }\n\n    // Build comment suffix.\n    let suffix = '';\n    if (commentCount > 0) {\n      suffix = Msg[\n        commentCount === 1\n          ? 'WORKSPACE_CONTENTS_COMMENTS_ONE'\n          : 'WORKSPACE_CONTENTS_COMMENTS_MANY'\n      ].replace('%1', String(commentCount));\n    }\n\n    // Build final message.\n    const msg = Msg[baseMsgKey]\n      .replace('%1', String(stackCount))\n      .replace('%2', suffix);\n\n    aria.announceDynamicAriaState(msg);\n  };\n\n  const shortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.INFORMATION,\n    preconditionFn: () => true,\n    callback: (workspace) => {\n      const focusedNode = getFocusManager().getFocusedNode();\n      const block = workspace\n        .getNavigator()\n        .getSourceBlockFromNode(focusedNode);\n      if (block) {\n        announceBlockInformation(block);\n        return true;\n      } else if (focusedNode === workspace) {\n        announceWorkspaceInformation(workspace);\n        return true;\n      }\n      return false;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.I],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_INFORMATION'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(shortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcut to announce an extended description of the\n * focused element.\n */\nexport function registerReadExtendedInformation() {\n  const shiftI = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.I, [\n    KeyCodes.SHIFT,\n  ]);\n  const shortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.EXTENDED_INFORMATION,\n    preconditionFn: () => true,\n    callback: (workspace) => {\n      const block = workspace\n        .getNavigator()\n        .getSourceBlockFromNode(getFocusManager().getFocusedNode());\n      if (!block) return false;\n\n      const toAnnounce = [];\n      // First go up the chain of output connections and start finding parents\n      // from there because the outputs of a block are read anyway, so we don't\n      // need to repeat them.\n      let startBlock = block;\n      while (startBlock.outputConnection?.isConnected()) {\n        startBlock = startBlock.getParent()!;\n      }\n\n      if (startBlock !== block) {\n        toAnnounce.push(computeAriaLabel(startBlock, aria.Verbosity.TERSE));\n      }\n\n      let parent = startBlock.getParent();\n      while (parent) {\n        toAnnounce.push(computeAriaLabel(parent, aria.Verbosity.TERSE));\n        parent = parent.getParent();\n      }\n\n      if (toAnnounce.length) {\n        toAnnounce.reverse();\n        if (!block.outputConnection?.isConnected()) {\n          // The current block was already read out earlier if it has an output\n          // connection.\n          toAnnounce.push(\n            Msg['CURRENT_BLOCK_ANNOUNCEMENT'].replace(\n              '%1',\n              computeAriaLabel(block, aria.Verbosity.TERSE),\n            ),\n          );\n        }\n\n        aria.announceDynamicAriaState(\n          Msg['PARENT_BLOCKS_ANNOUNCEMENT'].replace('%1', toAnnounce.join(',')),\n        );\n      } else {\n        aria.announceDynamicAriaState(Msg['NO_PARENT_ANNOUNCEMENT']);\n      }\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [shiftI],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_EXTENDED_INFORMATION'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(shortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcut to disconnect the focused block.\n */\nexport function registerDisconnectBlock() {\n  const shiftX = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.X, [\n    KeyCodes.SHIFT,\n  ]);\n  const disconnectShortcut: ShortcutRegistry.KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.DISCONNECT,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace, scope) => {\n      const focused = scope.focusedNode;\n      const result =\n        !workspace.isDragging() &&\n        !workspace.isReadOnly() &&\n        focused instanceof BlockSvg &&\n        !focused.isShadow();\n\n      if (!result) {\n        workspace.getAudioManager().playErrorBeep();\n      }\n      return result;\n    },\n    callback: (_workspace, event) => {\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      const curNode = getFocusManager().getFocusedNode();\n      if (!(curNode instanceof BlockSvg)) return false;\n\n      const healStack = !(event instanceof KeyboardEvent && event.shiftKey);\n      eventUtils.setGroup(true);\n      curNode.unplug(healStack);\n      eventUtils.setGroup(false);\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.X, shiftX],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_DISCONNECT'],\n  };\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(disconnectShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcuts to jump between stacks/top-level items on the\n * workspace.\n */\nexport function registerStackNavigation() {\n  /**\n   * Finds the stack root of the currently focused or specified item.\n   */\n  const resolveStack = (\n    workspace: WorkspaceSvg,\n    node = getFocusManager().getFocusedNode(),\n  ) => {\n    const navigator = workspace.getNavigator();\n\n    for (\n      let parent: IFocusableNode | null = node;\n      parent && parent !== workspace;\n      parent = navigator.getParent(parent)\n    ) {\n      node = parent;\n    }\n\n    if (!isSelectable(node)) return null;\n\n    return node;\n  };\n\n  const nextStackShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.NEXT_STACK,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n      !workspace.isDragging() &&\n      !!resolveStack(workspace) &&\n      !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n      !widgetDiv.isVisible(),\n    callback: (workspace) => {\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      const start = resolveStack(workspace);\n      if (!start) return false;\n      const target = workspace.getNavigator().navigateStacks(start, 1);\n      if (!target) return false;\n      getFocusManager().focusNode(target);\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.N],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_NEXT_STACK'],\n  };\n\n  const previousStackShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.PREVIOUS_STACK,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n      !workspace.isDragging() &&\n      !!resolveStack(workspace) &&\n      !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n      !widgetDiv.isVisible(),\n    callback: (workspace) => {\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      const start = resolveStack(workspace);\n      if (!start) return false;\n      // navigateStacks() returns the last connection in the stack when going\n      // backwards, but we want the root block, so resolve the stack from the\n      // element we get back.\n      const target = resolveStack(\n        workspace,\n        workspace.getNavigator().navigateStacks(start, -1),\n      );\n      if (!target) return false;\n      getFocusManager().focusNode(target);\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.B],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_PREVIOUS_STACK'],\n  };\n\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(nextStackShortcut);\n  ShortcutRegistry.registry.register(previousStackShortcut);\n}\n\n/**\n * Registers keyboard shortcuts to jump between headings (labels) in a flyout.\n *\n * Pressing H moves focus to the next heading; Shift+H moves focus to the\n * previous heading. The shortcut only activates when focus is already inside\n * the flyout; otherwise it returns false so other handlers may take over.\n */\nexport function registerHeadingNavigation() {\n  /**\n   * Returns the flyout the user is currently focused in, or null if focus is\n   * not inside any flyout's workspace.\n   */\n  const getActiveFlyout = (): IFlyout | null => {\n    const focusedTree = getFocusManager().getFocusedTree();\n    if (\n      focusedTree instanceof WorkspaceSvg &&\n      focusedTree.isFlyout &&\n      focusedTree.targetWorkspace\n    ) {\n      return focusedTree.targetWorkspace.getFlyout() ?? null;\n    }\n    return null;\n  };\n\n  /**\n   * Walks up from the focused node to find the top-level flyout item it\n   * belongs to (e.g. the block whose field is focused). Returns null if no\n   * flyout item is focused.\n   */\n  const getCurrentFlyoutItem = (flyout: IFlyout): IFocusableNode | null => {\n    const navigator = flyout.getWorkspace().getNavigator();\n    const items: IFocusableNode[] = flyout\n      .getContents()\n      .map((item) => item.getElement());\n    let node: IFocusableNode | null =\n      getFocusManager().getFocusedNode() ?? null;\n    while (node && !items.includes(node)) {\n      node = navigator.getParent(node);\n    }\n    return node;\n  };\n\n  /**\n   * Finds the next or previous heading in the flyout relative to the\n   * currently focused item, or the first/last heading if no flyout item is\n   * focused. Returns null if there is no heading to navigate to.\n   */\n  const findHeading = (\n    flyout: IFlyout,\n    direction: 1 | -1,\n  ): FlyoutButton | null => {\n    const items: IFocusableNode[] = flyout\n      .getContents()\n      .map((item) => item.getElement());\n    const current = getCurrentFlyoutItem(flyout);\n    // When nothing in the flyout is focused, start from before the first item\n    // (for next) or after the last item (for previous) so the loop finds the\n    // first or last heading respectively.\n    const startIndex = current\n      ? items.indexOf(current)\n      : direction === 1\n        ? -1\n        : items.length;\n\n    for (let offset = 1; offset <= items.length; offset++) {\n      const index = startIndex + direction * offset;\n      if (index < 0 || index >= items.length) break;\n      const item = items[index];\n      if (item instanceof FlyoutButton && item.isLabel()) {\n        return item;\n      }\n    }\n    return null;\n  };\n\n  const shiftH = ShortcutRegistry.registry.createSerializedKey(KeyCodes.H, [\n    KeyCodes.SHIFT,\n  ]);\n\n  const nextHeadingShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.NEXT_HEADING,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n      !workspace.isDragging() &&\n      !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n      !widgetDiv.isVisible() &&\n      !!getActiveFlyout(),\n    callback: () => {\n      const flyout = getActiveFlyout();\n      if (!flyout) return false;\n      const target = findHeading(flyout, 1);\n      if (!target) return false;\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      getFocusManager().focusNode(target);\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [KeyCodes.H],\n    displayText: () => Msg['SHORTCUTS_NEXT_HEADING'],\n  };\n\n  const previousHeadingShortcut: KeyboardShortcut = {\n    name: names.PREVIOUS_HEADING,\n    preconditionFn: (workspace) =>\n      !workspace.isDragging() &&\n      !dropDownDiv.isVisible() &&\n      !widgetDiv.isVisible() &&\n      !!getActiveFlyout(),\n    callback: () => {\n      const flyout = getActiveFlyout();\n      if (!flyout) return false;\n      const target = findHeading(flyout, -1);\n      if (!target) return false;\n      keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      getFocusManager().focusNode(target);\n      return true;\n    },\n    keyCodes: [shiftH],\n    displayText: () => '../../interfaces/i_focusable_node.js';\nimport {hasBubble} from '../../interfaces/i_has_bubble.js';\nimport type {INavigationPolicy} from '../../interfaces/i_navigation_policy.js';\nimport {RenderedConnection} from '../../rendered_connection.js';\n\n/**\n * Set of rules controlling keyboard navigation from a block.\n */\nexport class BlockNavigationPolicy implements INavigationPolicy<BlockSvg> {\n  /**\n   * Returns the first child of the given block.\n   *\n   * @param current The block to return the first child of.\n   * @returns The first icon, field, or input of the given block, if any.\n   */\n  getFirstChild(current: BlockSvg): IFocusableNode | null {\n    return getBlockNavigationCandidates(current)[0];\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the parent of the given block.\n   *\n   * @param current The block to return the parent of.\n   * @returns The top block of the given block's stack, or the connection to\n   *     which it is attached.\n   */\n  getParent(current: BlockSvg): IFocusableNode | null {\n    if (current.previousConnection?.targetBlock()) {\n      const surroundParent = current.getSurroundParent();\n      if (surroundParent) return surroundParent;\n    } else if (current.outputConnection?.targetBlock()) {\n      return current.outputConnection.targetBlock();\n    }\n\n    return current.workspace;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the next peer node of the given block.\n   *\n   * @param current The block to find the following element of.\n   * @returns The block's next connection, or the next peer on its parent block,\n   *     otherwise null.\n   */\n  getNextSibling(current: BlockSvg): IFocusableNode | null {\n    if (current.nextConnection) {\n      return current.nextConnection.targetBlock() ?? current.nextConnection;\n    } else if (current.outputConnection?.targetConnection) {\n      const parent = this.getParent(current) as BlockSvg;\n      return navigateBlock(parent, current, 1);\n    }\n\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the previous peer node of the given block.\n   *\n   * @param current The block to find the preceding element of.\n   * @returns The block's previous connection, or the previous peer on its\n   *     parent block, otherwise null.\n   */\n  getPreviousSibling(current: BlockSvg): IFocusableNode | null {\n    if (current.previousConnection?.targetBlock()) {\n      return current.previousConnection;\n    } else if (current.outputConnection?.targetBlock()) {\n      return navigateBlock(\n        current.outputConnection.targetBlock()!,\n        current,\n        -1,\n      );\n    }\n\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the visual row ID of the given block.\n   *\n   * @param current The block to retrieve the row ID of.\n   * @returns The row ID of the given block.\n   */\n  getRowId(current: BlockSvg) {\n    return current.getRowId();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns whether or not the given block can be navigated to.\n   *\n   * @param current The instance to check for navigability.\n   * @returns True if the given block can be focused.\n   */\n  isNavigable(current: BlockSvg): boolean {\n    return current.canBeFocused();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns whether the given object can be navigated from by this policy.\n   *\n   * @param current The object to check if this policy applies to.\n   * @returns True if the object is a BlockSvg.\n   */\n  isApplicable(current: any): current is BlockSvg {\n    return current instanceof BlockSvg;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns a list of the navigable children of the given block.\n *\n * @param block The block to retrieve the navigable children of.\n * @returns A list of navigable/focusable children of the given block.\n */\nfunction getBlockNavigationCandidates(block: BlockSvg): IFocusableNode[] {\n  const candidates: IFocusableNode[] = [];\n\n  // Icons and open bubbles are navigable.\n  for (const icon of block.getIcons()) {\n    // Icons hidden when the block is collapsed shouldn't be navigable.\n    if (block.isCollapsed() && !icon.isShownWhenCollapsed()) continue;\n    candidates.push(icon);\n    let bubble;\n    if (\n      hasBubble(icon) &&\n      icon.bubbleIsVisible() &&\n      (bubble = icon.getBubble())\n    ) {\n      candidates.push(bubble);\n    }\n  }\n\n  for (const input of block.inputList) {\n    // Invisible inputs are not valid navigation candidates.\n    if (!input.isVisible()) continue;\n\n    // Fields are navigable.\n    candidates.push(...input.fieldRow);\n\n    // Connections on inputs are navigable.\n    const connection = input.connection;\n    if (!connection) continue;\n    candidates.push(connection as RenderedConnection);\n\n    // Child blocks attached to inputs are navigable.\n    const attachedBlock = connection.targetBlock();\n    if (!attachedBlock) continue;\n    candidates.push(attachedBlock as BlockSvg);\n\n    // The last (empty) next connection in a child statement block stack is\n    // navigable.\n    const lastConnection = attachedBlock.lastConnectionInStack(false);\n    if (!lastConnection) continue;\n    candidates.push(lastConnection as RenderedConnection);\n  }\n\n  // The block's next connection is navigable.\n  if (block.nextConnection && !block.isCollapsed()) {\n    candidates.push(block.nextConnection);\n  }\n\n  return candidates;\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns the next navigable item relative to the provided block child.\n *\n * @param block The block whose children should be navigated.\n * @param current The navigable block child item to navigate relative to.\n * @param delta The difference in index to navigate; positive values navigate\n *     forward by n, while negative values navigate backwards by n.\n * @returns The navigable block child offset by `delta` relative to `current`.\n */\nexport function navigateBlock(\n  block: BlockSvg,\n  current: IFocusableNode,\n  delta: number,\n): IFocusableNode | null {\n  const candidates = getBlockNavigationCandidates(block);\n  const currentIndex = candidates.indexOf(current);\n  if (currentIndex === -1) return null;\n\n  const targetIndex = currentIndex + delta;\n  if (targetIndex >= 0 && targetIndex < candidates.length) {\n    return candidates[targetIndex];\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n","/**\n * @license\n * Copyright 2020 Google LLC\n * SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n// Former goog.module ID: {WorkspaceSvg} from './workspace_svg.js';\n\n/**\n * String for use in the \"custom\" attribute of a category in toolbox XML.\n * This string indicates that the category should be dynamically argument for a procedures_mutatorarg block.\n */\nexport const DEFAULT_ARG = 'x';\n\n/**\n * Find all user-created procedure definitions in a workspace.\n *\n * @param root Root workspace.\n * @returns Pair of arrays, the first contains procedures without return\n *     variables, the second with. Each procedure is defined by a three-element\n *     list of name, parameter list, and return value boolean.\n */\nexport function allProcedures(\n  root: Workspace,\n): [ProcedureTuple[], ProcedureTuple[]] {\n  const proceduresNoReturn: ProcedureTuple[] = root\n    .getProcedureMap()\n    .getProcedures()\n    .filter((p) => !p.getReturnTypes())\n    .map((p) => [\n      p.getName(),\n      p.getParameters().map((pa) => pa.getName()),\n      false,\n    ]);\n  root.getBlocksByType('procedures_defnoreturn', false).forEach((b) => {\n    if (!isProcedureBlock(b) && isLegacyProcedureDefBlock(b)) {\n      proceduresNoReturn.push(b.getProcedureDef());\n    }\n  });\n\n  const proceduresReturn: ProcedureTuple[] = root\n    .getProcedureMap()\n    .getProcedures()\n    .filter((p) => !!p.getReturnTypes())\n    .map((p) => [\n      p.getName(),\n      p.getParameters().map((pa) => pa.getName()),\n      true,\n    ]);\n  root.getBlocksByType('procedures_defreturn', false).forEach((b) => {\n    if (!isProcedureBlock(b) && isLegacyProcedureDefBlock(b)) {\n      proceduresReturn.push(b.getProcedureDef());\n    }\n  });\n  proceduresNoReturn.sort(procTupleComparator);\n  proceduresReturn.sort(procTupleComparator);\n  return [proceduresNoReturn, proceduresReturn];\n}\n\n/**\n * Comparison function for case-insensitive sorting of the first element of\n * a tuple.\n *\n * @param ta First tuple.\n * @param tb Second tuple.\n * @returns -1, 0, or 1 to signify greater than, equality, or less than.\n */\nfunction procTupleComparator(ta: ProcedureTuple, tb: ProcedureTuple): number {\n  return ta[0].localeCompare(tb[0], undefined, {sensitivity: 'base'});\n}\n\n/**\n * Ensure two identically-named procedures don't exist.\n * Take the proposed procedure name, and return a legal name i.e. one that\n * is not empty and doesn't collide with other procedures.\n *\n * @param name Proposed procedure name.\n * @param block Block to disambiguate.\n * @returns Non-colliding name.\n */\nexport function findLegalName(name: string, block: Block): string {\n  if (block.isInFlyout) {\n    // Flyouts can have multiple procedures called 'do something'.\n    return name;\n  }\n  name = name || Msg['UNNAMED_KEY'] || 'unnamed';\n  while (!isLegalName(name, block.workspace, block)) {\n    // Collision with another procedure.\n    const r = name.match(/^(.*?)(\\d+)$/);\n    if (!r) {\n      name += '2';\n    } else {\n      name = r[1] + (parseInt(r[2]) + 1);\n    }\n  }\n  return name;\n}\n/**\n * Does this procedure have a legal name?  Illegal names include names of\n * procedures already defined.\n *\n * @param name The questionable name.\n * @param workspace The workspace to scan for collisions.\n * @param opt_exclude Optional block to exclude from comparisons (one doesn't\n *     want to collide with oneself).\n * @returns True if the name is legal.\n */\nfunction isLegalName(\n  name: string,\n  workspace: Workspace,\n  opt_exclude?: Block,\n): boolean {\n  return !isNameUsed(name, workspace, opt_exclude);\n}\n\n/**\n * Return if the given name is already a procedure name.\n *\n * @param name The questionable name.\n * @param workspace The workspace to scan for collisions.\n * @param opt_exclude Optional block to exclude from comparisons (one doesn't\n *     want to collide with oneself).\n * @returns True if the name is used, otherwise return false.\n */\nexport function isNameUsed(\n  name: string,\n  workspace: Workspace,\n  opt_exclude?: Block,\n): boolean {\n  for (const block of workspace.getAllBlocks(false)) {\n    if (block === opt_exclude) continue;\n\n    if (\n      isLegacyProcedureDefBlock(block) &&\n      Names.equals(block.getProcedureDef()[0], name)\n    ) {\n      return true;\n    }\n  }\n\n  const excludeModel =\n    opt_exclude && isProcedureBlock(opt_exclude)\n      ? opt_exclude?.getProcedureModel()\n      : undefined;\n  for (const model of workspace.getProcedureMap().getProcedures()) {\n    if (model === excludeModel) continue;\n    if (Names.equals(model.getName(), name)) return true;\n  }\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Rename a procedure.  Called by the editable field.\n *\n * @param name The proposed new name.\n * @returns The accepted name.\n */\nexport function rename(this: Field, name: string): string {\n  const block = this.getSourceBlock();\n  if (!block) {\n    throw new UnattachedFieldError();\n  }\n\n  // Strip leading and trailing whitespace.  Beyond this, all names are legal.\n  name = name.trim();\n\n  const legalName = findLegalName(name, block);\n  if (isProcedureBlock(block) && !block.isInsertionMarker()) {\n    block.getProcedureModel().setName(legalName);\n  }\n  const oldName = this.getValue();\n  if (oldName !== name && oldName !== legalName) {\n    // Rename any callers.\n    const blocks = block.workspace.getAllBlocks(false);\n    for (let i = 0; i < blocks.length; i++) {\n      // Assume it is a procedure so we can check.\n      const procedureBlock = blocks[i] as unknown as ProcedureBlock;\n      if (procedureBlock.renameProcedure) {\n        procedureBlock.renameProcedure(oldName as string, legalName);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return legalName;\n}\n\n/**\n * Construct the blocks required by the flyout for the procedure category.\n *\n * @param workspace The workspace containing procedures.\n * @returns List of flyout contents as JSON.\n */\nexport function flyoutCategory(workspace: WorkspaceSvg): FlyoutItemInfo[] {\n  const blocks = [];\n  if (Blocks['procedures_defnoreturn']) {\n    blocks.push({\n      'kind': 'block',\n      'type': 'procedures_defnoreturn',\n      'gap': 16,\n      'fields': {\n        'NAME': Msg['PROCEDURES_DEFNORETURN_PROCEDURE'],\n      },\n    });\n  }\n  if (Blocks['procedures_defreturn']) {\n    blocks.push({\n      'kind': 'block',\n      'type': 'procedures_defreturn',\n      'gap': 16,\n      'fields': {\n        'NAME': Msg['PROCEDURES_DEFRETURN_PROCEDURE'],\n      },\n    });\n  }\n  if (Blocks['procedures_ifreturn']) {\n    blocks.push({\n      'kind': 'block',\n      'type': 'procedures_ifreturn',\n      'gap': 16,\n    });\n  }\n  if (blocks.length) {\n    // Add slightly larger gap between system blocks and user calls.\n    blocks[blocks.length - 1]['gap'] = 24;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates JSON block definitions for each of the given procedures.\n   *\n   * @param procedureList A list of procedures, each of which is defined by a\n   *     three-element list of name, parameter list, and return value boolean.\n   * @param templateName The type of the block to generate.\n   */\n  function populateProcedures(\n    procedureList: ProcedureTuple[],\n    templateName: string,\n  ) {\n    for (const [name, args] of procedureList) {\n      blocks.push({\n        'kind': 'block',\n        'type': templateName,\n        'gap': 16,\n        'extraState': {\n          'name': name,\n          'params': args,\n        },\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  const tuple = allProcedures(workspace);\n  populateProcedures(tuple[0], 'procedures_callnoreturn');\n  populateProcedures(tuple[1], 'procedures_callreturn');\n  return blocks;\n}\n\n/**\n * Updates the procedure mutator's flyout so that the arg block is not a\n * duplicate of another arg.\n *\n * @param workspace The procedure mutator's workspace. newMutationDom && utilsXml.domToText(newMutationDom);\n    if (oldMutation !== newMutation) {\n      // Fire a mutation on every caller block. string;\n  types?: string[];\n  [key: string]: unknown;\n}\n\n/**\n * A newable signature for an IProcedureModel.\n *\n * Refer to\n * https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/handbook/interfaces.html#difference-between-the-static-and-instance-sides-of-classes\n * for what is going on with this.\n */\ninterface ProcedureModelConstructor<ProcedureModel extends IProcedureModel> {\n  new (workspace: Workspace, name: string, id: string): ProcedureModel;\n\n  /**\n   * Deserializes the JSON state and returns a procedure model.\n   *\n   * @param state The state to deserialize.\n   * @param workspace The workspace to load the procedure model into.\n   * @returns The constructed procedure model.\n   */\n  loadState(state: object, workspace: Workspace): ProcedureModel;\n}\n\n/**\n * A newable signature for an IParameterModel.\n *\n * Refer to\n * https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/handbook/interfaces.html#difference-between-the-static-and-instance-sides-of-classes\n * for what is going on with this.\n */\ninterface ParameterModelConstructor<ParameterModel extends IParameterModel> {\n  new (workspace: Workspace, name: string, id: string): ParameterModel;\n\n  /**\n   * Deserializes the JSON state and returns a parameter model.\n   *\n   * @param state The state to deserialize.\n   * @param workspace The workspace to load the parameter model into.\n   * @returns The constructed parameter model.\n   */\n  loadState(state: object, workspace: Workspace): ParameterModel;\n}\n\n/**\n * Serializes the given IProcedureModel to JSON.\n */\nexport function saveProcedure(proc: IProcedureModel): State {\n  const state: State = proc.saveState();\n  if (!proc.getParameters().length) return state;\n  state.parameters = proc.getParameters().map((param) => param.saveState());\n  return state;\n}\n\n/**\n * Deserializes the given procedure model State from JSON.\n */\nexport function loadProcedure<\n  ProcedureModel extends IProcedureModel,\n  ParameterModel extends IParameterModel,\n>(\n  procedureModelClass: ProcedureModelConstructor<ProcedureModel>,\n  parameterModelClass: ParameterModelConstructor<ParameterModel>,\n  state: State,\n  workspace: Workspace,\n): ProcedureModel {\n  const proc = procedureModelClass.loadState(state, workspace);\n  if (!state.parameters) return proc;\n  for (const [index, param] of state.parameters.entries()) {\n    proc.insertParameter(\n      parameterModelClass.loadState(param, workspace),\n      index,\n    );\n  }\n  return proc;\n}\n\n/** Serializer for saving and loading procedure state. */\nexport class ProcedureSerializer<\n  ProcedureModel extends IProcedureModel,\n  ParameterModel extends IParameterModel,\n> implements ISerializer {\n  public priority = priorities.PROCEDURES;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructs the procedure serializer.\n   *\n   * Example usage:\n   *   new ProcedureSerializer(MyProcedureModelClass, MyParameterModelClass)\n   *\n   * @param procedureModelClass The class (implementing IProcedureModel) that\n   *     you want this serializer to deserialize.\n   * @param parameterModelClass The class (implementing IParameterModel) that\n   *     you want this serializer to deserialize.\n   */\n  constructor(\n    private readonly procedureModelClass: ProcedureModelConstructor<ProcedureModel>,\n    private readonly parameterModelClass: ParameterModelConstructor<ParameterModel>,\n  ) {}\n\n  /** Serializes the procedure models of the given workspace. */\n  save(workspace: Workspace): State[] | null {\n    const save = workspace\n      .getProcedureMap()\n      .getProcedures()\n      .map((proc) => saveProcedure(proc));\n    return save.length ? save : null;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Deserializes the procedures models defined by the given state into the\n   * workspace.\n   */\n  load(state: State[], workspace: Workspace) {\n    const map = workspace.getProcedureMap();\n    for (const procState of state) {\n      map.add(\n        loadProcedure(\n          this.procedureModelClass,\n          this.parameterModelClass,\n          procState,\n          workspace,\n        ),\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  /** Disposes of any procedure models that exist on the workspace. */\n  clear(workspace: Workspace) {\n    workspace.getProcedureMap().clear();\n  }\n}\n","/**\n * @license\n * Copyright 2011 Google LLC\n * SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n// Former goog.module ID: Blockly.inject\n\nimport type {BlocklyOptions} from './blockly_options.js';\nimport * as browserEvents from './browser_events.js';\nimport * as bumpObjects from './bump_objects.js';\nimport * as common from './common.js';\nimport * as Css from './css.js';\nimport * as dropDownDiv from './dropdowndiv.js';\nimport {Grid} from './grid.js';\nimport {keyboardNavigationController} from './keyboard_navigation_controller.js';\nimport {Options} from './options.js';\nimport {ScrollbarPair} from './scrollbar_pair.js';\nimport * as Tooltip from './tooltip.js';\nimport * as Touch from './touch.js';\nimport * as aria from './utils/aria.js';\nimport * as dom from './utils/dom.js';\nimport {Svg} from './utils/svg.js';\nimport * as WidgetDiv from './widgetdiv.js';\nimport {WorkspaceSvg} from './workspace_svg.js';\n\n/**\n * Inject a Blockly editor into the specified container element (usually a div).\n *\n * @param container Containing element, or its ID, or a CSS selector.\n * @param opt_options Optional dictionary of options.\n * @returns Newly created main workspace.\n */\nexport function inject(\n  container: Element | string,\n  opt_options?: BlocklyOptions,\n): WorkspaceSvg {\n  let containerElement: Element | null = null;\n  if (typeof container === 'string') {\n    containerElement =\n      document.getElementById(container) || document.querySelector(container);\n  } else {\n    containerElement = container;\n  }\n  // Verify that the container is in document.\n  if (\n    !document.contains(containerElement) &&\n    document !== containerElement?.ownerDocument\n  ) {\n    throw Error('Error: container is not in current document');\n  }\n  const options = new Options(opt_options || ({} as BlocklyOptions));\n  const subContainer = document.createElement('div');\n  dom.addClass(subContainer, 'injectionDiv');\n  if (opt_options?.rtl) {\n    dom.addClass(subContainer, 'blocklyRTL');\n  }\n  aria.setRole(subContainer, aria.Role.APPLICATION);\n\n  containerElement!.appendChild(subContainer);\n  const svg = createDom(subContainer, options);\n\n  const workspace = createMainWorkspace(subContainer, svg, options);\n\n  init(workspace);\n\n  // Keep focus on the first workspace so entering keyboard navigation looks\n  // correct.\n  common.setMainWorkspace(workspace);\n\n  common.svgResize(workspace);\n\n  subContainer.addEventListener('focusin', function () {\n    common.setMainWorkspace(workspace);\n  });\n\n  browserEvents.conditionalBind(\n    subContainer,\n    'keydown',\n    null,\n    common.globalShortcutHandler,\n  );\n\n  aria.initializeGlobalAriaLiveRegion(subContainer);\n\n  return workspace;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create the SVG image.\n *\n * @param container Containing element.\n * @param options Dictionary of options.\n * @returns Newly created SVG image.\n */\nfunction createDom(container: HTMLElement, options: Options): SVGElement {\n  // Sadly browsers (Chrome vs Firefox) are currently inconsistent in laying\n  // out content in RTL mode.  Therefore Blockly forces the use of LTR,\n  // then manually positions content in RTL as needed.\n  container.setAttribute('dir', 'LTR');\n\n  // Load CSS.\n  Css.inject(container, options.hasCss, options.pathToMedia);\n\n  // Build the SVG DOM.\n  /*\n    <svg\n      xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\n      xmlns:html=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\"\n      xmlns:xlink=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink\"\n      version=\"1.1\"\n      class=\"blocklySvg\">\n      ...\n    </svg>\n    */\n  const svg = dom.createSvgElement(\n    Svg.SVG,\n    {\n      'xmlns': dom.SVG_NS,\n      'xmlns:html': dom.HTML_NS,\n      'xmlns:xlink': dom.XLINK_NS,\n      'version': '1.1',\n      'class': 'blocklySvg',\n    },\n    container,\n  );\n  /*\n    <defs>\n      ... filters go here ...\n    </defs>\n    */\n  const defs = dom.createSvgElement(Svg.DEFS, {}, svg);\n  // Each filter/pattern needs a unique ID for the case of multiple Blockly\n  // instances on a page.  Browser behaviour becomes undefined otherwise.\n  // https://neil.fraser.name/news/2015/11/01/\n  const rnd = String(Math.random()).substring(2);\n\n  options.gridPattern = Grid.createDom(\n    rnd,\n    options.gridOptions,\n    defs,\n    container,\n  );\n  return svg;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a main workspace and add it to the SVG.\n *\n * @param svg SVG element with pattern defined.\n * @param options Dictionary of options.\n * @returns Newly created main workspace.\n */\nfunction createMainWorkspace(\n  injectionDiv: HTMLElement,\n  svg: SVGElement,\n  options: Options,\n): WorkspaceSvg {\n  options.parentWorkspace = null;\n  const mainWorkspace = new WorkspaceSvg(options);\n  const wsOptions = mainWorkspace.options;\n  mainWorkspace.scale = wsOptions.zoomOptions.startScale;\n  svg.appendChild(\n    mainWorkspace.createDom('blocklyMainBackground', injectionDiv),\n  );\n\n  // Set the theme name and renderer name onto the injection div.\n  const rendererClassName = mainWorkspace.getRenderer().getClassName();\n  if (rendererClassName) {\n    dom.addClass(injectionDiv, rendererClassName);\n  }\n  const themeClassName = mainWorkspace.getTheme().getClassName();\n  if (themeClassName) {\n    dom.addClass(injectionDiv, themeClassName);\n  }\n\n  if (!wsOptions.hasCategories && wsOptions.languageTree) {\n    // Add flyout as an <svg> that is a sibling of the workspace SVG.\n    const flyout = mainWorkspace.addFlyout(Svg.SVG);\n    injectionDiv.insertBefore(flyout, svg);\n  }\n  if (wsOptions.hasTrashcan) {\n    mainWorkspace.addTrashcan();\n  }\n  if (wsOptions.zoomOptions && wsOptions.zoomOptions.controls) {\n    mainWorkspace.addZoomControls();\n  }\n  // Register the workspace svg as a UI component.\n  mainWorkspace\n    .getThemeManager()\n    .subscribe(svg, 'workspaceBackgroundColour', 'background-color');\n\n  // A null translation will also apply the correct initial scale.\n  mainWorkspace.translate(0, 0);\n\n  mainWorkspace.addChangeListener(\n    bumpObjects.bumpIntoBoundsHandler(mainWorkspace),\n  );\n\n  // The SVG is now fully assembled.\n  common.svgResize(mainWorkspace);\n  WidgetDiv.createDom();\n  dropDownDiv.createDom();\n  Tooltip.createDom();\n  return mainWorkspace;\n}\n\n/**\n * Initialize Blockly with various handlers.\n *\n * @param mainWorkspace Newly created main workspace.\n */\nfunction init(mainWorkspace: WorkspaceSvg) {\n  const options = mainWorkspace.options;\n  const svg = mainWorkspace.getParentSvg();\n\n  // Suppress the browser's context menu.\n  browserEvents.conditionalBind(\n    svg.parentNode as Element,\n    'contextmenu',\n    null,\n    function (e: Event) {\n      if (!browserEvents.isTargetInput(e)) {\n        e.preventDefault();\n      }\n    },\n  );\n\n  const workspaceResizeHandler = browserEvents.conditionalBind(\n    window,\n    'resize',\n    null,\n    function () {\n      // Don't hide all the chaff. Leave the dropdown and widget divs open if\n      // possible.\n      Tooltip.hide();\n      mainWorkspace.hideComponents(true);\n      dropDownDiv.repositionForWindowResize();\n      WidgetDiv.repositionForWindowResize();\n      common.svgResize(mainWorkspace);\n      bumpObjects.bumpTopObjectsIntoBounds(mainWorkspace);\n    },\n  );\n  mainWorkspace.setResizeHandlerWrapper(workspaceResizeHandler);\n\n  bindDocumentEvents();\n\n  if (options.languageTree) {\n    const toolbox = mainWorkspace.getToolbox();\n    const flyout = mainWorkspace.getFlyout(true);\n    if (toolbox) {\n      toolbox.init();\n    } else if (flyout) {\n      // Build a fixed flyout with the root blocks.\n      flyout.init(mainWorkspace);\n      flyout.show(options.languageTree);\n      if (typeof flyout.scrollToStart === 'function') {\n        flyout.scrollToStart();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (options.hasTrashcan) {\n    mainWorkspace.trashcan!.init();\n  }\n  if (options.zoomOptions && options.zoomOptions.controls) {\n    mainWorkspace.zoomControls_!.init();\n  }\n\n  if (options.moveOptions && options.moveOptions.scrollbars) {\n    const horizontalScroll =\n      options.moveOptions.scrollbars === true ||\n      !!options.moveOptions.scrollbars.horizontal;\n    const verticalScroll =\n      options.moveOptions.scrollbars === true ||\n      !!options.moveOptions.scrollbars.vertical;\n    mainWorkspace.scrollbar = new ScrollbarPair(\n      mainWorkspace,\n      horizontalScroll,\n      verticalScroll,\n      'blocklyMainWorkspaceScrollbar',\n    );\n    mainWorkspace.scrollbar.resize();\n  } else {\n    mainWorkspace.setMetrics({x: 0.5, y: 0.5});\n  }\n\n  // Load the sounds.\n  if (options.hasSounds) {\n    loadSounds(options.pathToMedia, mainWorkspace);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Whether event handlers have been bound. Document event handlers will only\n * be bound once, even if Blockly is destroyed and reinjected.\n */\nlet documentEventsBound = false;\n\n/**\n * Bind document events, but only once.  Destroying and reinjecting Blockly\n * should not bind again.\n * Bind events for scrolling the workspace.\n * Most of these events should be bound to the SVG's surface.\n * However, 'mouseup' has to be on the whole document so that a block dragged\n * out of bounds and released will know that it has been released.\n */\nfunction bindDocumentEvents() {\n  if (!documentEventsBound) {\n    browserEvents.conditionalBind(document, 'scroll', null, function () {\n      const workspaces = common.getAllWorkspaces();\n      for (let i = 0, workspace; (workspace = workspaces[i]); i++) {\n        if (workspace instanceof WorkspaceSvg) {\n          workspace.updateInverseScreenCTM();\n        }\n      }\n    });\n    // longStop needs to run to stop the context menu from showing up.  It\n    // should run regardless of what other touch event handlers have run.\n    browserEvents.bind(document, 'touchend', null, Touch.longStop);\n    browserEvents.bind(document, 'touchcancel', null, Touch.longStop);\n    browserEvents.bind(document, 'keydown', null, function (e: KeyboardEvent) {\n      if (e.key === 'Tab') {\n        keyboardNavigationController.setIsActive(true);\n      }\n    });\n  }\n  documentEventsBound = true;\n}\n\n/**\n * Load sounds for the given workspace.\n *\n * @param pathToMedia The path to the media directory.\n * @param workspace The workspace to load sounds for.\n */\nfunction loadSounds(pathToMedia: string, workspace: WorkspaceSvg) {\n  const audioMgr = workspace.getAudioManager();\n  audioMgr.load([`${pathToMedia}click.mp3`], 'click');\n  audioMgr.load([`${pathToMedia}disconnect.mp3`], 'disconnect');\n  audioMgr.load([`${pathToMedia}delete.mp3`], 'delete');\n  audioMgr.load([`${pathToMedia}drop.mp3`], 'drop');\n}\n","/**\n * @license\n * Copyright 2020 Google LLC\n * SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n// Former goog.module ID: Blockly.ContextMenuItems\n\nimport type {BlockSvg} from './block_svg.js';\nimport * as clipboard firstField?.isFullBlockField();\n}\n\n/**\n * Option to undo previous action.\n */\nexport function registerUndo() {\n  const undoOption: RegistryItem = {\n    displayText() {\n      return Msg['UNDO'];\n    },\n    preconditionFn(scope: Scope) {\n      if (scope.workspace!.getUndoStack().length > 0) {\n        return 'enabled';\n      }\n      return 'disabled';\n    },\n    callback(scope: Scope) {\n      scope.workspace!.undo();\n    },\n    scopeType: ContextMenuRegistry.ScopeType.WORKSPACE,\n    id: 'undoWorkspace',\n    weight: 1,\n    associatedKeyboardShortcut: 'undo',\n  };\n  ContextMenuRegistry.registry.register(undoOption);\n}\n\n/**\n * Option to redo previous action.\n */\nexport function registerRedo() {\n  const redoOption: RegistryItem = {\n    displayText() {\n      return Msg['REDO'];\n    },\n    preconditionFn(scope: Scope) {\n      if (scope.workspace!.getRedoStack().length > 0) {\n        return 'enabled';\n      }\n      return associatedKeyboardShortcut: 'redo',\n  };\n  ContextMenuRegistry.registry.register(redoOption);\n}\n\n/**\n * Option to clean up blocks.\n */\nexport function registerCleanup() {\n  const cleanOption: RegistryItem = {\n    displayText() {\n      return Msg['CLEAN_UP'];\n    },\n    preconditionFn(scope: Scope) {\n      if (scope.workspace!.isMovable()) {\n        if (scope.workspace!.getTopBlocks(false).length > 1) {\n          return 'enabled';\n        }\n        return 'disabled';\n      }\n      return 'hidden';\n    },\n    callback(scope: Scope) {\n      scope.workspace!.cleanUp();\n    },\n    scopeType: ContextMenuRegistry.ScopeType.WORKSPACE,\n    id: 'cleanWorkspace',\n    weight: 3,\n    associatedKeyboardShortcut: 'cleanup',\n  };\n  ContextMenuRegistry.registry.register(cleanOption);\n}\n/**\n * Creates a callback to collapse or expand top blocks.\n *\n * @param shouldCollapse Whether a block should collapse.\n * @param topBlocks Top blocks in the workspace.\n */\nfunction toggleOption_(shouldCollapse: boolean, topBlocks: BlockSvg[]) {\n  const DELAY = 10;\n  let ms = 0;\n  let timeoutCounter = 0;\n  function timeoutFn(block: BlockSvg) {\n    timeoutCounter--;\n    block.setCollapsed(shouldCollapse);\n    if (timeoutCounter === 0) {\n      Events.setGroup(false);\n    }\n  }\n  Events.setGroup(true);\n  for (let i = 0; i < topBlocks.length; i++) {\n    let block: BlockSvg | null = topBlocks[i];\n    while (block) {\n      timeoutCounter++;\n      setTimeout(timeoutFn.bind(null, block), ms);\n      block = block.getNextBlock();\n      ms += DELAY;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Option to collapse all blocks.\n */\nexport function registerCollapse() {\n  const collapseOption: RegistryItem = {\n    displayText() {\n      return Msg['COLLAPSE_ALL'];\n    },\n    preconditionFn(scope: Scope) {\n      if (scope.workspace!.options.collapse) {\n        const topBlocks = scope.workspace!.getTopBlocks(false);\n        for (let i = 0; i < topBlocks.length; i++) {\n          let block: BlockSvg | null = topBlocks[i];\n          while (block) {\n            if (!block.isCollapsed()) {\n              return 'enabled';\n            }\n            block = block.getNextBlock();\n          }\n        }\n        return 'disabled';\n      }\n      return 'hidden';\n    },\n    callback(scope: Scope) {\n      toggleOption_(true, scope.workspace!.getTopBlocks(true));\n    },\n    scopeType: ContextMenuRegistry.ScopeType.WORKSPACE,\n    id: 'collapseWorkspace',\n    weight: 4,\n  };\n  ContextMenuRegistry.registry.register(collapseOption);\n}\n\n/**\n * Option to expand all blocks.\n */\nexport function registerExpand() {\n  const expandOption: RegistryItem = {\n    displayText() {\n      return Msg['EXPAND_ALL'];\n    },\n    preconditionFn(scope: Scope) {\n      if (scope.workspace!.options.collapse) {\n        const topBlocks = scope.workspace!.getTopBlocks(false);\n        for (let i = 0; i < topBlocks.length; i++) {\n          let block: BlockSvg | null = topBlocks[i];\n          while (block) {\n            if (block.isCollapsed()) {\n              return 'enabled';\n            }\n            block = block.getNextBlock();\n          }\n        }\n        return 'disabled';\n      }\n      return 'hidden';\n    },\n    callback(scope: Scope) {\n      toggleOption_(false, scope.workspace!.getTopBlocks(true));\n    },\n    scopeType: ContextMenuRegistry.ScopeType.WORKSPACE,\n    id: 'expandWorkspace',\n    weight: 5,\n  };\n  ContextMenuRegistry.registry.register(expandOption);\n}\n/**\n * Adds a block and its children to a list of deletable blocks.\n *\n * @param block to delete.\n * @param deleteList list of blocks that can be deleted.\n *     This will be modified in place with the given block and its descendants.\n */\nfunction addDeletableBlocks_(block: BlockSvg, deleteList: BlockSvg[]) {\n  if (block.isDeletable()) {\n    Array.prototype.push.apply(deleteList, block.getDescendants(false));\n  } else {\n    const children = block.getChildren(false);\n    for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {\n      addDeletableBlocks_(children[i], deleteList);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Constructs a list of blocks that can be deleted in the given workspace.\n *\n * @param workspace to delete all blocks from.\n * @returns list of blocks to delete.\n */\nfunction getDeletableBlocks_(workspace: WorkspaceSvg): BlockSvg[] {\n  const deleteList: BlockSvg[] = [];\n  const topBlocks = workspace.getTopBlocks(true);\n  for (let i = 0; i < topBlocks.length; i++) {\n    addDeletableBlocks_(topBlocks[i], deleteList);\n  }\n  return deleteList;\n}\n\n/**\n * Deletes the given blocks. Used to delete all blocks in the workspace.\n *\n * @param deleteList List of blocks to delete.\n * @param eventGroup Event group ID with which all delete events should be\n *     associated.  If not specified, create a new group.\n */\nfunction deleteNext_(deleteList: BlockSvg[], eventGroup?: string) {\n  const DELAY = 10;\n  if (eventGroup) {\n    eventUtils.setGroup(eventGroup);\n  } else {\n    eventUtils.setGroup(true);\n    eventGroup = eventUtils.getGroup();\n  }\n  const block = deleteList.shift();\n  if (block) {\n    if (!block.isDeadOrDying()) {\n      block.dispose(false, true);\n      setTimeout(deleteNext_, DELAY, deleteList, eventGroup);\n    } else {\n      deleteNext_(deleteList, eventGroup);\n    }\n  }\n  eventUtils.setGroup(false);\n}\n\n/**\n * Option to delete all blocks.\n */\nexport function registerDeleteAll() {\n  const deleteOption: RegistryItem = {\n    displayText(scope: Scope) {\n      if (!scope.workspace) {\n        return '';\n      }\n      const deletableBlocksLength = getDeletableBlocks_(scope.workspace).length;\n      if (deletableBlocksLength === 1) {\n        return Msg['DELETE_BLOCK'];\n      }\n      return Msg['DELETE_X_BLOCKS'].replace('%1', `${deletableBlocksLength}`);\n    },\n    preconditionFn(scope: Scope) {\n      if (!scope.workspace) {\n        return 'disabled';\n      }\n      const deletableBlocksLength = getDeletableBlocks_(scope.workspace).length;\n      return deletableBlocksLength > 0 ? 'enabled' : 'disabled';\n    },\n    callback(scope: Scope) {\n      if (!scope.workspace) {\n        return;\n      }\n      scope.workspace.cancelCurrentGesture();\n      const deletableBlocks = getDeletableBlocks_(scope.workspace);\n      if (deletableBlocks.length < 2) {\n        deleteNext_(deletableBlocks);\n      } else {\n        dialog.confirm(\n          Msg['DELETE_ALL_BLOCKS'].replace(\n            '%1',\n            String(deletableBlocks.length),\n          ),\n          function (ok) {\n            if (ok) {\n              deleteNext_(deletableBlocks);\n            }\n          },\n        );\n      }\n    },\n    scopeType: ContextMenuRegistry.ScopeType.WORKSPACE,\n    id: 'workspaceDelete',\n    weight: 6,\n  };\n  ContextMenuRegistry.registry.register(deleteOption);\n}\n/** Registers all workspace-scoped context menu items. */\nfunction registerWorkspaceOptions_() {\n  registerUndo();\n  registerRedo();\n
